rules.rule_text:
title: Amsi.DLL Loaded Via LOLBIN Process
id: 6ec86d9e-912e-4726-91a2-209359b999b9
status: test
description: Detects loading of "Amsi.dll" by a living of the land process. This could
  be an indication of a "PowerShell without PowerShell" attack
references:
- Internal Research
- https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/blog/security-operations/stopping-powershell-without-powershell/
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2023-06-01
modified: 2025-10-07
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
logsource:
  category: image_load
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ImageLoaded|endswith: \amsi.dll
    Image|endswith:
    - \ExtExport.exe
    - \odbcconf.exe
    - \rundll32.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
